document: 1000 VDC Disconnect Switches. LS6 series. Energy-efficient compact units that preserve battery life and minimize shock hazards. Allow users to isolate circuits by quickly breaking the flow of electrical current. Available in 1-pole or 2-pole configurations. Current ratings of 250 A or 400 A. SCCR 10 kA. Impulse voltage withstand 12 kV. UL 94V-0 flammability rating. UL Listed. REACH and RoHS compliant. Self-cleaning contacts. Self-extinguishing nonflammable materials. Applications: solar PV systems, energy storage systems, oil and gas rigs, railways, EV chargers, uninterruptible power supplies, battery-powered vehicles and industrial equipment, DC motors, locomotive batteries.

metadata.applications: Solar/PV, energy storage, EV chargers, railway, oil and gas, UPS, battery vehicles

document: 1500 VDC Disconnect Switches. Series: LS6R0250, LS6R0400, LS7R02502PS00L, LS7R03202PS00L, LS7R04002PS00L, LS7R05002PS00L. Energy-efficient compact units that quickly break or safely resume flow of electrical current. Patented operation minimizes arc damage when disconnecting. Available in optimal ampere ratings. Applications: solar PV systems, energy storage systems, oil and gas, railway, EV chargers, UPS, battery isolation. Utility-scale solar, high-voltage industrial DC systems.

metadata.applications: Utility-scale solar, energy storage, EV chargers, railway, oil and gas, UPS

document: 500 VDC Disconnect Switches. LS6 series. Energy-efficient compact units that preserve battery life and minimize shock hazards. Patented operation reduces arc flash risks during disconnection. Available in 1-pole or 2-pole configurations. Current ratings of 250 A or 400 A. SCCR 10 kA. Impulse voltage withstand 12 kV. UL 94V-0. UL Listed. REACH and RoHS compliant. Self-cleaning contacts. Applications: solar PV systems, energy storage systems, oil and gas rigs, railways, EV chargers, uninterruptible power supplies, battery-powered vehicles.

metadata.applications: Solar/PV, energy storage, EV chargers, railway, oil and gas, UPS

document: Electrical Battery Disconnect Switches. Remote battery disconnect, remote battery cutoff switch, remote battery kill switch. Electromagnetic relay battery disconnect activated by ignition or cabin switch. Double-pole or single-pole circuitry. Bi-stable relays. Many are waterproof. ADR (Accord Dangereux Routier) versions available. Usable as power relays for high current devices. Continuous current ratings 150 A to 500 A. SPST or DPST circuitry. IP ratings IP65 to IP67/IP69K. Time delay and programmable time delay options. Remotely disconnects battery from vehicle electrical system. Prevents battery drain. Safeguards against thermal events in accidents.

metadata.applications: Commercial vehicles, fleet management, marine, remote battery isolation

document: Manual Battery Disconnect Switches. Battery cutoff switch, battery isolation switch, battery shutoff switch. Completely disconnects electrical current running through a vehicle or equipment. Continuous current ratings from 40 A to 600 A. Single-pole and double-pole options. Actuator styles: push-button, T-handle, rotary knob, key, lever. Metal or thermoplastic housings for heavy-duty marine and commercial applications. Water-resistant and waterproof options IP43 to IP67 and IPX9K. Applications: heavy-duty trucks, construction, emergency vehicles, buses and transit, military, agricultural. Safety: prevents damage from short-circuit fires, allows mechanics to shut down electrical systems, prevents parasitic battery drain.

metadata.actuator_styles: Push-button, T-handle, rotary knob, key, lever
metadata.applications: Heavy-duty trucks, construction, emergency vehicles, buses, military, agricultural

document: Detect Switches. C&K brand. Largest selection in SMT, through-hole, panel, snap-in/chassis and screw-mount switches. Various sizes and shapes. Actuator orientations: vertical, horizontal, top, side, right-angle, left-angle. Soft actuation force. Compact designs. Low current capabilities. Long life. Applications: appliances, consumer electronics, building solutions, health care, data center and communications, passenger car vehicle electronics.

metadata.mounting: SMT, through-hole, panel, snap-in, chassis, screw-mount
metadata.applications: Appliances, consumer electronics, building, healthcare, data center, automotive

document: Linear DIP Switches. C&K brand. Used as address switches for industrial controls, portable and handheld electronic devices. Logic switching in computers and peripherals. Function controlling in numerous applications. Ultra-miniature half-pitch DIP switches, low-profile and standard-profile DIP switches, jumper switches. Through-hole and surface-mount models. Process sealed for surface-mount soldering and washable processing. Applications: general industrial and electrical equipment, building solutions, data center and communications, consumer electronics.

metadata.applications: Industrial controls, computers, peripherals, consumer electronics, building

document: Rotary DIP Switches. C&K brand. For timers, automation components, alarms, access controls, smoke detectors. Miniature switches. Robust metal cover in black or silver nickel finish. Wide selection of codings. Vertical or reverse versions. Applications: general industrial and electrical equipment, building solutions, data center and communications, consumer electronics.

metadata.features: Metal cover, wide codings, vertical or reverse
metadata.applications: Timers, automation, alarms, access controls, smoke detectors

document: Fusible Disconnect Switches. Also known as fused disconnect switch or switch-fuse or fuse switch disconnector. Combines disconnect switch and fuse in one compact device. Allows operators to turn power on or off. Provides overcurrent protection by automatically breaking circuit on overload or short circuit. Safeguards equipment and personnel. Class J Fuse Disconnect Switch LM3200. Applications: industrial control panels, power distribution systems, renewable energy applications.

metadata.features: Integrated fuse and disconnect, overcurrent protection
metadata.products: LM3200 Class J Fuse Disconnect Switch
metadata.applications: Industrial control panels, power distribution, renewable energy

document: Ignition Switches. Metal or plastic housings. Keys or levers. Harness or stud connectors. Sealed waterproof ignition switch with integrated connector. Heavy-duty starter switch ideal for diesel ignition. Marine-grade starter switches. Standard-body levered or keyed ignition switches. Accessories: harnesses, keys, caps. Continuous current ratings 5 A to 70 A. Optimized for 12 V systems. SAE J259 standard tested. Multiple switch positions. Some models usable as DC disconnect switches. Applications: agricultural equipment, commercial vehicles, construction equipment, material handling equipment, maritime equipment, watercraft.

metadata.applications: Agricultural, commercial vehicles, construction, material handling, marine, watercraft

document: Load Switch ICs. Integrated load switch ICs. Industry-leading performance in ultralow power consumption. Low IQ, ISD, and RDS(on). Curtails parasitic leakage current. Enhances system efficiency. Extends battery lifespan. For battery-powered devices and systems requiring power management.

metadata.features: Ultralow power, low IQ, low ISD, low RDS(on), parasitic leakage reduction
metadata.applications: Battery-powered devices, power management, IoT, mobile devices

document: Plunger Switches. Mechanical plunger switches for commercial vehicles. Signal situations including power takeoff, idle and reverse gear, differential block, low gears brake failure, reduced gears, handbrake failure. 5-volt DIN plunger switches and 12-volt to 24-volt mechanical plunger switches. Normally open or normally closed contact configurations. Different electrical connections. Silver-plated and gold-plated contacts. Normally open, normally closed, and normally open-normally closed configurations.

metadata.voltage: 5 V DIN or 12 V to 24 V
metadata.applications: Commercial vehicles, power takeoff, gear sensing, brake failure detection, handbrake

document: Push Button Switches. C&K brand. Reliable control for electronics, industrial, automotive, commercial vehicle applications. Miniature, subminiature, ultra-miniature designs. PCB, surface-mount, panel-mount. Momentary or latching versions. SPST, SPDT, DPST, DPDT circuit configurations. Illuminated, sealed, low-profile options. Snap-in, threaded, surface-mount mounting. Wide actuator shapes styles and colors. Automotive lineup: light-duty and heavy-duty for 12 V and 24 V systems. Current ratings 5 A to 35 A. Normally open contacts. Corrosion-resistant contacts for harsh environments. Applications: general industrial, building, data center, consumer electronics, aviation defense space, transportation.

metadata.voltage: Up to 250 VAC / 30 VDC, 12 V and 24 V automotive
metadata.applications: Industrial, building, data center, consumer electronics, aviation, defense, transportation

document: Push-Pull Switches. Commercial vehicle automotive push-pull switches. Single-circuit and dual-circuit push-pull switches. Marine push-pull switches. Three-position and four-position headlight switches. Heavy-duty push-pull switches for general-purpose automotive. Push-pull magneto switches. SPST, SPDT, DPDT, DPTT circuitry. Mounting body and actuator features for ease-of-use and extended lifecycle. Applications: commercial vehicles, marine, automotive lighting control.

metadata.applications: Commercial vehicles, marine, automotive headlight and lighting control

document: Rocker Switches. C&K brand. Reliable control for electronic, industrial, commercial vehicle applications. Standard and heavy-duty automotive switches. C&K miniature, subminiature, and power rocker switches. Multi-pole, multi-position switching. Sealed and waterproof designs for harsh environments. LED and incandescent illuminated versions. High-current designs. Panel-mount: snap-in, narrow-body, front-mount, rear-mount. PCB mount: through-hole, vertical, right-angle, surface-mount. Recessed switch guards. Moisture-resistant housings. DPDT, DPST, SPDT, SPST, 3PDT, 4PDT options. Applications: vehicles, industrial equipment, control panels, electronic systems, appliances, data center, consumer electronics, transportation, healthcare.

metadata.mounting: Panel snap-in, narrow-body, front-mount, rear-mount, PCB through-hole, SMT
metadata.applications: Vehicles, industrial, control panels, electronics, appliances, healthcare

document: Rotary Switches. C&K brand. Wide range for electronic, industrial, commercial vehicle applications. Low-level signal switching to higher current control. Indexing options for 10 mA to 12 A. Switchlock, multi-pole, multi-position, half-inch, rota-slide, power rota-slide, sub-miniature designs. Shorting and non-shorting contacts. Miniature and subminiature PCB designs. Solder lug, PC through-hole, wire lead, quick connect terminations. Automotive: 12 V to 24 V rotary switches. Universal rotary switches, electronic rotary dimmer switches, reversing switches, rotary headlamp and light switches. Sealed options. Actuators: levers, keys, printed knobs. Applications: industrial, building, data center, consumer electronics, transportation, healthcare.

metadata.voltage: 12 V to 24 V automotive, low level to 12 A
metadata.features: Multi-pole multi-position, shorting and non-shorting, switchlock, sealed options
metadata.applications: Industrial, building, data center, consumer electronics, transportation, healthcare

document: Slide Switches. C&K brand. Ultra-miniature, micro, miniature, standard, industrial, and power versions. PCB, surface-mount, panel-mount. SPST, SPDT, SP3T, DPST, DPDT, 3PDT, 4PDT, 4P3T functions. Positive detent, sealing, shorting or non-shorting contacts. Voltage select switch option. SMD, PCB, panel-mount. Sealed option available. Applications: controllers, consumer goods, headphones, HVAC controls, audio equipment, alarms, appliances, building, data center, consumer electronics, transportation.

metadata.applications: Controllers, consumer goods, headphones, HVAC, audio, alarms, appliances

document: Snap Switches. C&K brand. Ultra-miniature, sub-miniature, mid-size, large, heavy-duty, metal case models. Limit switches. Actuator configurations: pin plunger, lever, roller lever. Electrical ratings from low levels up to 30 amperes. Broad range of operating forces. Terminal styles: PCB through-hole, quick connect, wire leads, screw, solder, flat, step base. Sealed models. SPST, SPDT, DPST, DPDT functionality. Mounting: vertical, right-angle, PCB, snap-in. General-purpose, precision, interlock, mini, small, mid-size, large, heavy-duty, sealed categories. Applications: appliances, building, consumer electronics, transportation, healthcare.

metadata.applications: Appliances, building, consumer electronics, transportation, healthcare

document: Special Purpose Switches. Commercial vehicle and equipment applications. General-purpose and special-purpose switches. Neutral safety switch, backup switch, temperature switch, stoplamp switch, brake switch, foot-operated on-off switch, purpose-built automotive switches.

metadata.applications: Commercial vehicles, neutral safety, backup, temperature, stoplamp, brake, foot-operated

document: Tactile Switches. C&K brand. Miniature, ultra-miniature, micro-miniature tactile switches for PCB mounting. J-bend, gullwing, illuminated, sealed, low-profile, low-noise, SMT, through-hole versions. Superior performance tunable to application requirements. Silver or gold terminations. Applications: general industrial, building, data center, consumer electronics, aviation defense space, transportation, healthcare.

metadata.applications: Industrial, building, data center, consumer electronics, aviation, defense, transportation, healthcare

document: Toggle Switches. C&K brand. Reliable control for industrial, automotive, commercial vehicle, marine, electronics applications. Light-duty, heavy-duty, extra-heavy-duty switches. Miniature, subminiature, ultra-miniature C&K switches. General-purpose, illuminated, special-purpose versions. Multiple circuit options. PCB, SMT, bushing mounting with vertical, right-angle, vertical-right-angle brackets. Sealed and waterproof for dust and water protection. High-power models up to 10 A. Custom wire harness support. Applications: general industrial, data center, transportation, healthcare.

metadata.applications: Industrial, automotive, commercial vehicle, marine, electronics, data center, transportation, healthcare

document: Windshield Wiper Switches. Electrical and electronic switches for heavy-duty vehicle windshield wiper control. In-cabin control. 3-position, 4-position, 5-position, 6-position wiper switch options. Various mounting, body, actuator features. Rotary windshield wiper switches with push-to-wash capability. Built for heavy-duty commercial vehicles. Applications: construction, agricultural, material handling vehicles.

metadata.applications: Construction, agricultural, material handling heavy-duty vehicles
